description: Tibetan medicine views emotional disturbances as rlung (wind) imbalances and addresses them at their root.
Bloating, indigestion, IBS, and poor appetite treated through digestive fire (mé) restoration.
Chronic fatigue and insomnia addressed through constitutional balancing and calming herbal formulas.
Joint pain, back pain, and muscular issues treated with combination therapies targeting root causes.
Menstrual irregularities, menopause, and hormonal disruptions supported through holistic balancing.
Eczema, acne, psoriasis, and skin inflammation treated through internal cleansing and herbal medicine.
Chronic respiratory conditions and weakened immunity strengthened through lung tonification.
Complementary support for cancer patients focusing on quality of life and immune system strengthening.
